= IKE Base Parent

image:https://img.shields.io/maven-central/v/network.ike/ike-base-parent[Maven Central,link=https://central.sonatype.com/artifact/network.ike/ike-base-parent]

Tier 0 foundation parent for the IKE Network — the apex of the
        parent inheritance forest, inherited by ike-tooling, ike-docs,
        and ike-platform. Carries shared publishing metadata, GPG
        signing, and Maven Central publishing configuration.
